description_long: This object is a compact, double-barreled shotgun with a distinctive steampunk-inspired design. The barrels are short and arranged side-by-side, featuring a ribbed texture and a dark metallic finish. The stock and grip are crafted from a reddish-brown material, likely wood or a synthetic substitute, and are accented with brass or gold-colored hardware, including a prominent trigger guard and mechanical components. The receiver area is detailed with gears and metallic embellishments, giving it a mechanical, almost ornamental appearance. The trigger guard is rounded and substantial, providing ample space for finger placement. Overall, the shotgun combines traditional firearm elements with decorative, industrial motifs.
description: A compact, side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a reddish-brown stock, dark ribbed barrels, and brass mechanical accents in a steampunk style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the reddish-brown stock, dark ribbed barrels, and brass hardware.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the twin barrel openings and the ribbed texture, with brass accents visible around the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the stock and barrel details, with mechanical components and trigger guard visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the rounded end of the stock and the alignment of the barrels, with the receiver and trigger guard partially visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel with ribbed texture and short length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, large, and reinforced with a smooth metallic finish
